important.subject: FW: Understanding the NOAH certification process
important.snippet: Good afternoon, Nanci: Brie Horseman, the Mscapes Vice President of Design, provided me your email address and updated me on the NOAH certification process. As you are probably acutely aware, the past six month has been a time of uncertainty in off shore tariffs. As this process is now coming into a clearer focus, our offshore production plans are also becoming more focused. From your first correspondence with Brie Horseman and Harshad Chandrak, we were producing a unit in India and shipping the full unit to the USA. We continue to look at that process but also have a project in the works to use an "assembly" operation in the USA, using parts coming in from both India and Europe for final assembly in the USA and placement on a trailer in the USA. I would like to have a conversation with you about how we can accomplish this process. One option we are exploring is shipping units ready to place on a trailer with all MEP installed offshore. important.subject: Meet Harshad; Saharsh
important.snippet: Hi Harshad, Writing to reconnect on the message I sent earlier. I am Chief Operating Officer at MDSPL, a BIM consulting company that provides Virtual Design and Construction solutions to architects, engineers, and construction firms around the world. At MDSPL, we work closely with companies like Saharsh, co-creating solutions that translate virtual planning into real-world construction, helping projects stay on schedule, within budget, and maintain high quality standards. From 3D modeling to 4D and 5D simulations, clash detection, quantity and cost estimation, construction sequencing, and 6D facility management, we cover the full project lifecycle. I can also share a strong use case from the Construction sector that illustrates how our approach has helped similar organizations achieve better results. Please let me know a good time to connect, or you can book directly via our calendar link.<https://calendly.com/rahul-d-mdspl/30min> Respectfully, Mukesh Jangir Chief Operating Officer Mer
